title: Low-cost high entropy alloy (HEA) for high-efficiency oxygen evolution reaction (OER)
classification_notes: GPT error: Unterminated string starting at: line 144 column 24 (char 12241)

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports a low-cost Co-Fe-Ga-Ni-Zn high-entropy alloy that forms oxidized surface high-entropy hydroxides and shows efficient, stable oxygen evolution electrocatalysis.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper likely contains experimental characterization and electrochemical performance data for the Co-Fe-Ga-Ni-Zn high-entropy alloy and its oxidized surface hydroxides, but no accessible dataset location could be confirmed from the provided information.
